rule.name: PS_FormatStatusDisplay
rule.description: Support rule to format the status column of a process report grid [Tasking] [Records]
rule.definition: if( or( ri!status < 0, a!isNullOrEmpty(ri!status), /*If the total number of options in the choose() below is changed, then this number needs to change accordingly*/ ri!status => 12 ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "WAIT_CLOCK"), altText: "Unknown status", caption: "Unknown status" ), choose( ri!status + 1, #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "PROGRESS_RUNNING"), altText: "Assigned", caption: "Assigned" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "PROGRESS_RUNNING"), altText: "Viewed by Assignee", caption: "Viewed by Assignee" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "STATUS_OK"), altText: "Completed", caption: "Completed" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "STATUS_NOTDONE"), altText: "Not Started", caption: "Not Started" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "STATUS_NOTDONE"), altText: "Cancelled", caption: "Cancelled" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "PROGRESS_PAUSED"), altText: "Paused", caption: "Paused" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "STATUS_WARN"), altText: "Unattended", caption: "Unattended" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "STATUS_ERROR"), altText: "Aborted", caption: "Aborted" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "STATUS_ERROR"), altText: "Cancelled By Exception", caption: "Cancelled By Exception" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "PROGRESS_RUNNING"), altText: "Submitted", caption: "Submitted" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "PROGRESS_RUNNING"), altText: "Running", caption: "Running" ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_documentImage"( document: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_iconIndicator"(icon: "STATUS_ERROR"), altText: "Error", caption: "Error" ) ) )
